title: 🚨 Urgent Feature Request: Auto-Apply Filter Conditions to New

posts.author: JoseV (Jose )
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When working in a filtered view on Monday, it’s essential that any new item created within that view automatically inherits the filter conditions as Notions brilliantly works.

Right now, if we’re filtered by, for example, a specific status or person, new items are created outside of that filter, which breaks workflows, causes confusion, and adds manual steps that shouldn’t be necessary.

This is a critical feature for teams who rely on filtered views to manage segmented workflows or dashboards. Please prioritize this,it’s becoming increasingly difficult to maintain data consistency and efficiency without it.

Thanks in advance for your attention to this!

What are you trying to achieve

it’s essential that any new item created within a filter view automatically inherits the filter conditions.
